reviews.title: Best gift option
reviews.body: Maine apni friend ko uske birthday par diya tha. Use bahut pasand aaya maine 2 order or kar lioye wo b aaj mil gye

reviews.author: Aarush Khurana
reviews.title: Bohat hi classy bracelet hai
reviews.body: Teeno bracelets ki quality mujhe bahut hi achhi lagi, ekdum premium feel dete hain

reviews.author: Siddharth Nair
reviews.body: Adjustable fit hone ki wajah se easily wrist pe perfect baith jata hai aur daily wear me bhi bilkul comfortable feel hota hai 😊

reviews.author: Saanvi Rathore
reviews.body: Light mein ye bahut sundar chamakta hai. Party wear ke liye ye ek perfect accessory hai.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
The LUVIYA 18K Gold Tone Plated Bracelet is designed to bring together elegance, modern styling, and everyday versatility. With its sleek dual-line structure and refined stone detailing, this piece stands out without being overpowering. The rich gold tone finish gives it a premium look, while the minimal yet stylish design makes it easy to pair with both casual and occasion outfits.

What makes this bracelet special is its balanced design — subtle sparkle from embedded stones combined with a clean, structured form. It adds just the right amount of shine to elevate your overall appearance without needing additional accessories. Whether you’re dressing up for an event or adding a polished touch to your daily look, this bracelet fits effortlessly into your style.

Crafted for comfort and durability, it offers a smooth wearing experience with a secure fit. It’s not just a jewellery piece, but a reliable go-to accessory that enhances confidence and completes your look with ease.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
• Dual-Line Designer Cuff – Features a sleek double-band structure with embedded crystal lining for a refined look.

• Lightweight & Anti-Tarnish Design – Comfortable for all-day wear with a coating that helps maintain shine over time.

• 18K Gold Tone Finish – Rich gold plating that delivers a luxurious shine and elegant presence.

• Precision Stone Setting – Fine crystal detailing along the band enhances sparkle without overpowering the design.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Premium Alloy Base – Ensures durability and strong structure.

• 18K Gold Tone Plating – Provides rich shine and luxurious finish.

• High-Quality Stone Inlay – Adds sparkle and elegant detailing.

Innovation

• Premium Dual-Layer Bracelet Design with Elegant Stone Detailing.

• 18K Gold Tone Finish for Rich Luxury Appeal.

• Stylish Fusion of Minimal & Statement Jewellery.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Enhances Overall Look – Instantly adds a luxurious and polished touch to any outfit.

• Perfect for Every Occasion – Suitable for daily wear, parties, and special events.

• Lightweight Comfort – Stylish yet comfortable for long hours of wear.

• Statement Yet Subtle – Eye-catching design without being overpowering.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
• Gently open the cuff and slide it onto your wrist for a secure fit.

• Wear it as a standalone statement piece for a clean, elegant look.

• Pair it with your daily outfits or occasion wear to instantly elevate your style.

• Avoid direct contact with water, perfume, or chemicals to maintain its shine.

• Store in a dry jewellery box or pouch when not in use to preserve finish and quality.
